overview: ÆSTRALTØ is an isometric tactical combat and world-exploration game with sprite-based enemies, draggable UI panels, procedural audio, and summon allies.
features: Click a moving enemy's visible body to target it directly via per-frame sprite-rect hit-testing
Draggable UI panels with stronger magnetic snapping, live snap preview, and edge alignment
Panel layout saved to the backend and restored on relogin or a fresh device
Procedural WebAudio sound engine synthesizing twelve combat and pickup events with volume and mute controls
Summon allies that move and then cast or attack in the same turn
